description: Agent skill for GemachDAO Glend — a DeFi Lend & Borrow platform on Pharos Testnet, Ethereum, and Base

skill.name: glend
skill.description: Agent instructions for supplying, borrowing, repaying, and withdrawing on the Glend DeFi lending protocol (Aave V3 on Pharos, Compound fork on Ethereum and Base) using viem.
skill.compatibility: Compatible with all skills.sh agent frameworks including Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, and OpenCode.
